form_name: F2S - Manage Lifecycle AFP - MM & SD Status

questions.text: Manage Lifecycle is a new tool to update MM and SD status of materials, as well as Substitution Management and can be used Daily (night) / Weekly (Monday) / Monthly (1st day)
A single Fiori Tile can be used to manage authorization for SD and MM status
Status change/evolution is based in a Decision Table built by Plant (with the possibility do also create rules by Division and Material Account Assignment Group)
Options are available for Automatic updates and for User Validation Requests
